needs.summary: Monthly reminder-send aggregate stats for the stat cards: total sends, delivered count, SMS-only send count, SMS cost for the month, and the credits-per-automated-send rate. Delivery rate and credits consumed are derived client-side from these.
needs.filters/actions: scoped to a calendar month (current month); platform-wide across all businesses

needs.summary: Recent reminder sends list across all businesses for the delivery-monitor table, newest first, with per-send business name, channel, template step, sent timestamp, delivery status, and route cost in kobo.
needs.filters/actions: filter by channel (sms|whatsapp) and status (delivered|failed|queued); admin table pagination per conventions (?page=&limit=)

needs.summary: Average route cost per SMS as a weekly time series (last 12 weeks, oldest first, kobo) for the sparkline and its start/end callouts.
needs.filters/actions: channel = sms only; grouped by week over a trailing 12-week window

needs.summary: Retry a failed reminder send: re-queue a send whose status is failed (UI transitions it to queued). Only valid on failed sends. Must record to admin_audit_log per conventions.
needs.filters/actions: action: retry; precondition status == failed; result status -> queued
